name: Cobra Resources plc
summary: Cobra Resources plc engages in the exploration and mining of gold and copper. It holds 100% interests in the Wudinna project covering an area of 1,928 square kilometers located in Central Gawler Craton Gold Province, South Australia; and the Prince Alfred Copper project situated approximately 100 km north-east of Port Augusta, South Australia. Cobra Resources plc was incorporated in 2018 and is headquartered in London, the United Kingdom.
